title: Terrible quality
body: I bought this blender two weeks ago and the motor already burned out. Completely waste of money and very poor build quality.

title: Size question
body: Does this jacket run true to size or should I order one size up? The size chart on the listing is confusing.

title: Love this product
body: This is hands down the best coffee maker I have ever owned. Brews fast and the coffee tastes amazing every single time.

title: Better packaging needed
body: The company should use more protective packaging for fragile items. My last two orders arrived with dented boxes and scratched surfaces.

title: Exchange needed
body: The shoes I received are the wrong size. I would like to exchange them for a size 10 instead. Please send me the return instructions.

title: Disappointing purchase
body: The noise-canceling headphones I ordered barely block any sound. The description was misleading and I feel completely ripped off.

title: Material question
body: What type of fabric is used for the lining of this winter coat? I have sensitive skin and need to check for allergens.

title: Exceeded expectations
body: I was skeptical about ordering furniture online but the dining table arrived in perfect condition and looks even better than the photos.

title: Wider color options
body: It would be great if this backpack came in more color options. Right now there are only black and grey which feels very limited.

title: Replacement needed
body: The screen protector I received has a visible crack right out of the box. Please send me a replacement as soon as possible.

title: False advertising
body: The smartwatch battery was advertised as lasting five days but it barely makes it through one full day. This is completely misleading.

title: Compatibility check
body: Will this laptop charger work with the 2024 model or is it only compatible with older versions? I want to confirm before purchasing.

title: Outstanding quality
body: The leather wallet I ordered is beautifully crafted with excellent stitching. You can tell this is a premium product worth every penny.

title: Easier returns please
body: The return process is too complicated and requires printing labels. An option to drop off returns at a nearby location would be much more convenient.

title: Cancel my order
body: I placed an order by mistake about an hour ago. Please cancel order number ORD-88421 before it ships and issue a full refund.

title: Defective item
body: The electric kettle I received has a broken lid that does not close properly. This is a safety hazard and completely unacceptable.

title: Ingredient list
body: Could you share the full list of ingredients for this skincare product? I want to make sure it does not contain parabens or sulfates.

title: Great customer service
body: I had an issue with my order and the support team resolved it within minutes. Truly impressed with how professional and quick they were.

title: Subscription option
body: You should offer a monthly subscription plan for consumable products like coffee pods and filters. It would save customers time on reordering.

title: Refund for damaged item
body: The mirror I ordered arrived shattered into pieces despite being marked as fragile. I need a full refund processed to my original payment method.

title: Overpriced for quality
body: For the price I paid I expected much better quality. The zipper on this bag broke after only three uses and the fabric feels very cheap.

title: Shipping times
body: How long does standard shipping take to Eastern Canada? I need this item by next Friday and want to know if I should upgrade to express.

title: Highly recommend
body: I have been using this air purifier for a month now and the difference in air quality is noticeable. My allergies have improved significantly.

title: Gift wrapping
body: Adding a gift wrapping option at checkout would be a great idea especially during the holiday season. I would happily pay a few extra dollars for it.

title: Price match request
body: I noticed the same product is available for fifteen dollars less on another website. Could you match that price or offer a discount code?
